spells.name: Undead Ward
spells.description: Creates a 10ft radius ward around the caster. Undead must make a WIS saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or be unable to enter the warded area. Does not destroy or turn undead — only prevents entry.
spells.author_note: Fifteen years perfecting it. It worked perfectly and solved nothing — his companions were already inside the ward when they became undead.

features.name: Totemic Assault
features.description: When hitting with a weapon or cantrip, channel spirit energy for 1d8 lightning or cold damage.

features.name: Life Bearer
features.description: When casting a healing spell, add WIS modifier to the healing done.

features.name: Totemic Blessing
features.description: Bind any totem and use its effect as a bonus action when healing an ally.

features.name: Spirit Communion
features.description: Once per long rest, speak directly with any spirit within one mile, asking three questions.

features.name: Sacred Focus: Mind
features.description: Add WIS modifier to Intelligence and Charisma checks and saving throws.

features.name: Dagger of Swift Strike
features.description: Once per turn on a hit with this dagger, immediately make a second strike with it as part of the same attack. No bonus action required.
features.note: Item feature, not a class feature — stored here because it has a rules definition that needs to be referenced.

features.name: Tactical Foresight
features.description: When using Master of Tactics Help action, target two allies instead of one. Each gains a bonus to their next saving throw equal to the user's INT modifier.

features.name: Commander's Presence
features.description: Allies within 30ft gain a bonus to AC or saving throws from constant tactical advice.

features.name: The Retired Special
features.description: Once per day, reaction when an ally is hit: toss a psychic thread and pull the ally up to 15ft to an unoccupied space, potentially causing the attack to miss.

features.name: Grandmaster's Stitch
features.description: During a long rest, touch a leather armor or leather item. That item becomes infused for 24 hours — wearer gains resistance to Psychic damage and advantage on saving throws against Charmed and Frightened.
